title: No-anchor visual-positive subcluster CTF top2 p005 gain
module_detail: M7 retrieves a visual-positive component edge, M8 resolves it as a small subcluster repair instead of a whole-component merge, and M12 validates the delivered identity decision through density_simple plus p005_area.
used_in_pipeline: yes: promoted as current no-anchor best after direct, density_simple and valid p005_area scoring
summary: A broad visual-positive edge 87 -> 86 was previously too risky as a full merge. This iteration keeps the edge but applies a Re-ID-CTF-style top-k filter using DINOv2, SigLIP and weakmetric agreement. Only seq 5550 and 2987 move from component 87 / gid 960000351 to component 86 / gid 960000350. Canonical p005_area improves from 0.668198 to 0.668332.
implementation: The implementation treats generated/visual positive evidence as a proposal, not a forced identity label. A candidate edge first identifies the source and target components. The reviewer ranks source tracklets by agreement across DINOv2, SigLIP and weakmetric similarities to the target centroid. The scorer tests top1, top2, top4 and top8. Top2 is the only promoted setting because it improves direct score and the canonical delivery path; larger top-k settings regress, confirming that the correct operation is a small subcluster move, not a full merge.
environment: no anchors; GT used only by evaluator after assignment materialization

workflow_steps.input: existing visual edge 87 -> 86 plus current best assignment
workflow_steps.action: reuse the visual-positive edge only as a candidate source
workflow_steps.output: a risky full-merge candidate and a source component to audit

workflow_steps.input: DINOv2, SigLIP and weakmetric source-to-target similarities
workflow_steps.action: rank source tracklets by ensemble percentile agreement
workflow_steps.output: seq 5550 and seq 2987 as the top2 CTF-pass tracklets

workflow_steps.input: ranked source tracklets and current assignment
workflow_steps.action: move only the top-k subcluster from component 87 to component 86
workflow_steps.output: rank01, rank02, rank03 and rank04 assignment variants

workflow_steps.action: reject broad top-k variants and keep only positive top2
run density_simple and real p005_area scoring

per_video_table.note: canonical aggregate IDF1 after density_simple + p005_area
the actual changed tracklets are in MCAM04 Tc6

visual_cases.title: Rank02 top2 subcluster repair: component 87 -> 86
visual_cases.summary: Two moved tracklets with three sampled frames each. Shows predicted_global_id 960000351 -> 960000350 and component 87 -> 86.
visual_cases.failure_reason: Full visual-positive merge 87 -> 86 was too broad; leaving all tracklets in 87 kept a small compatible island split from 86.
visual_cases.improvement: The CTF reviewer keeps only seq 5550 and 2987, improving direct, density and p005 delivery while preserving the rest of component 87.

visual_cases.title: Real-frame context: cross-camera global-id success
visual_cases.summary: Previously extracted real-frame montage showing what an identity evidence chain should look like when raw frames are available.
visual_cases.failure_reason: Coordinate-only panels cannot show appearance cues.
visual_cases.improvement: The package carries real-frame context next to the new coordinate-level top2 case.

visual_cases.title: Real-frame context: same-tracklet sequence
visual_cases.summary: Previously extracted real-frame tracklet timeline used as visual reference for repeated-frame support.
visual_cases.improvement: Timeline panels illustrate how repeated-frame evidence should be inspected for future raw-frame cases.

ablations.name: full visual-positive merge 87 -> 86
ablations.change: Move all 147 source tracklets to target 86.

ablations.name: rank01 top1 CTF
ablations.change: Move only seq 5550 from component 87 to 86.
ablations.decision: tiny direct change; not enough for promotion

ablations.name: rank02 top2 CTF
ablations.change: Move seq 5550 and 2987 from component 87 to 86.

ablations.name: rank03 top4 CTF
ablations.change: Move the top4 ranked source tracklets.
ablations.decision: killed; adding more positives reverses the gain

ablations.name: rank04 top8 CTF
ablations.change: Move the top8 ranked source tracklets.

ablations.name: rank05 top16 CTF
ablations.change: Start top16 broadening run after top4/top8 regressions.
ablations.result: interrupted before completion after lower top-k variants had already failed
ablations.decision: not kept; no evidence to justify extra complexity

bitbucket: pushed to Novateur/vlincs_reid_by_search branch wisc; package path reports/vlincs_iterations/20260624_visual_subcluster_ctf_top2_p005_gain/
next: Use the Diffusion-ReID idea more literally: generate or augment positive views only for already CTF-passing small islands, then require an opponent score and direct+density+p005 verification before promotion. Do not use generated samples to justify whole-component merges.
